name: Bitcoin
description: Original peer-to-peer cash. Nakamoto consensus, UTXO model, SHA-256 mining.

name: Ethereum
description: Programmable blockchain. EVM, smart contracts, Gasper proof-of-stake consensus.

name: Solana
description: High-throughput L1. Proof-of-History clock + Tower BFT. Sealevel parallel VM.

name: Cardano
description: Peer-reviewed design. Ouroboros PoS, eUTXO model, Plutus smart contracts.

name: Polkadot
description: Multichain relay network. Nominated PoS, parachain sharding, XCM cross-chain messaging.

name: Avalanche
description: Triple-chain architecture (X/P/C). Snowflake/Snowball consensus, sub-second finality.

name: Cosmos
description: Internet of Blockchains. Tendermint BFT, IBC protocol, app-specific chain architecture.

name: BNB Chain
description: EVM-compatible high-throughput chain. Proof-of-Staked-Authority with 21 validators.

name: NEAR Protocol
description: Sharded L1. Nightshade sharding, Doomslug PoS, account-based model, Rainbow Bridge.

name: Sui
description: Object-centric L1. Mysticeti BFT, Move VM, parallel object execution, DAG mempool.

name: Aptos
description: Move-based L1. Block-STM parallel execution engine, DiemBFT v4 consensus protocol.

name: Arbitrum
description: Optimistic rollup on Ethereum. Nitro engine, interactive fraud proofs, EVM equivalence.

name: Optimism
description: OP Stack modular rollup. Bedrock architecture, fault proofs, EVM-equivalent execution.

name: Polygon
description: ZK rollup with zkEVM. Plonky2 proving system, EVM equivalence, AggLayer aggregation.

name: Base
description: Coinbase OP Stack rollup. Bedrock fork, EVM-equivalent execution, no native gas token.

name: zkSync Era
description: ZK rollup with zkEVM. Boojum proof system, native account abstraction, zkPorter DA.

name: Stellar
description: Federated Byzantine agreement. Stellar Consensus Protocol, built-in DEX, fast payments.

name: Algorand
description: Pure PoS with cryptographic sortition. Immediate finality, no forks, AVM smart contracts.
